description: The Clan Licciardi is a powerful Camorra syndicate based in the Secondigliano district of Naples, Italy. Founded in the mid-1980s by Gennaro Licciardi, it transformed the area into a strategic hub for drug storage and trafficking. After Gennaro's death, leadership passed to his siblings, notably Maria Licciardi. The clan is part of the Alleanza di Secondigliano cartel and has been involved in internal conflicts and large-scale drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: il clan Licciardi è attivo nei Paesi Bassi nel settore della contraffazione di marchi, dall'abbigliamento agli utensili.
country_links.context: The clan is active in the Netherlands in the counterfeit goods sector.
